insight: When scan logs show "Ignoring item ... with custom lore" and rules aren't catching hacked items, the cause is `Ignore.Custom_Lore: true` (or Custom_Display_Name/Custom_Model_Data) in settings.yml — these skip items BEFORE any rules run. Hacked items often have custom lore/names, so these globals effectively bypass all rules. Fix: set them to `false` and use per-rule `ignore lore`/`ignore displayname`/`ignore modeldata` operators to whitelist specific plugin items instead.
